profile.description: Commit-safe baseline for recreating oh-my-harness local Pi capabilities without storing private values.

packageIntents.name: oh-my-harness
packageIntents.notes: The package represented by this repository. Runtime extension list remains in package.json.

packageIntents.name: pi-clear
packageIntents.notes: Recent manual package install signal: pi install npm:pi-clear. This records profile intent only; it does not add a package.json Pi extension.

toggles.name: ENABLE_LITELLM
toggles.requiredWhen: Set to true only on machines that should register the LiteLLM provider.
toggles.notes: omh proxies configure writes this toggle only after endpoint and API key values are available locally.

toggles.name: ENABLE_QUOTIO
toggles.requiredWhen: Set to true only on machines that should register the Quotio LiteLLM provider.
toggles.notes: The env-loader reads CWD .env first and overrides process.env.

toggles.name: ENABLE_CCS
toggles.requiredWhen: Set to true only on machines that should register the CCS provider.
toggles.notes: omh proxies configure writes this toggle only after endpoint and API key values are available locally.

toggles.name: ENABLE_WORKSPACE_CONNECTORS
toggles.requiredWhen: Set to true only on machines that should expose Linear/Notion OAuth MCP connector commands and tools.
toggles.notes: Connector OAuth state remains local and must be recreated per machine.

toggles.name: ENABLE_WORKSPACE_CLI_TOOLS
toggles.requiredWhen: Set to true on Pi machines that should expose the Linear issue, Notion wiki, and GitHub repository CLI tools selected by the Pi runtime profile.
toggles.notes: External CLI credentials remain owned by each CLI and are never stored by oh-my-harness.

configuration.name: LITELLM_BASE_URL
configuration.notes: OpenAI-compatible LiteLLM base URL; the value remains local-only.

configuration.name: QUOTIO_BASE_URL
configuration.notes: Treat as local configuration that may reveal private network topology. Commit only the key name and intent.

configuration.name: CCS_BASE_URL
configuration.notes: Anthropic-compatible CCS local proxy base URL; the value remains local-only.

configuration.name: GITLAB_HOST
configuration.requiredWhen: Optional when the company GitLab instance is not the glab default context.
configuration.notes: Host name only; do not pair it with tokens in committed files.

secrets.name: LITELLM_API_KEY
secrets.notes: Virtual key for the configured LiteLLM gateway.

secrets.name: QUOTIO_API_KEY
secrets.notes: Authentication token for the configured Quotio/OpenAI-compatible proxy.

secrets.name: CCS_API_KEY
secrets.notes: Authentication token for the configured CCS/CLIProxy endpoint.

oauthStateBoundaries.stateBoundary: mcp-remote and Pi OAuth/session files are machine-local and may appear in local auth stores such as .mcp-auth/, .pi/, or home-directory auth locations.
oauthStateBoundaries.recreateBy: Enable workspace connectors locally, then run /connector-login linear and complete the browser/terminal OAuth flow on that machine.

oauthStateBoundaries.stateBoundary: mcp-remote and Pi OAuth/session files are machine-local and may appear in local auth stores such as .mcp-auth/, .pi/, or home-directory auth locations.
oauthStateBoundaries.recreateBy: Enable workspace connectors locally, then run /connector-login notion and complete the browser/terminal OAuth flow on that machine.

localOnlyPaths.reason: CWD environment file containing toggles, endpoint values, and API keys.
Potential environment variants that can contain secrets or private endpoints.
OAuth state/cache for remote MCP connectors.
Local Pi session/OAuth state generated while using connectors.
Pi agent authentication material outside the repository.
Local OAuth token store for workspace connector browser OAuth.
Secret-free but machine-local connector setup mode/selection state.

recreateOnAnotherMachine: Install oh-my-harness with pi install git:github.com/zzanghyunmoo/oh-my-harness or the private SSH equivalent.
If this profile should include the manual package signal, install pi-clear with pi install npm:pi-clear.
Create a local CWD .env with ENABLE_LITELLM, ENABLE_QUOTIO, ENABLE_CCS, ENABLE_WORKSPACE_CONNECTORS, and/or ENABLE_WORKSPACE_CLI_TOOLS set to true only for capabilities needed on that machine.
For a proxy provider, set its local *_BASE_URL and *_API_KEY values, then run omh proxies configure --only <id> --apply to persist and enable it without putting the key in command history.
When workspace connectors are enabled, run /connector-login linear and/or /connector-login notion on that machine to recreate OAuth state.
Run /connector-setup full, selective, or minimal on that machine to record local connector setup intent.
